overview: The BA (Hons) in English is an outstanding program providing students with an opportunity to learn English in a congenial environment. The BA in English syllabus combines English Literature, Language and Linguistics with broad general background. This program is also designed for foundation training for the school and college level teachers.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Minimum second division or (2.5 GPA on average) both in SSC and HSC. Students from English medium, have to complete 5 subjects in O level, 2 subjects in A level. Out of these 7 subjects, 4 have to be minimum B and 3 have to be minimum C. A grade is not acceptable.
curriculum_highlights: Literature in the Age of Media
facilities: Credit transfer & exchange program in foreign universities
